title: EFTLM_WeaponOfMiracles
description: This mod works with EpicFight: TouhouLittleMaid to support weapons from WeaponOfMiracles.
body: This mod, combined with EpicFight: TouhouLittleMaid and WeaponOfMiracles, lets maids unlock combat forms.![Maid battle scene](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9096519c19bb7fb0aa6630eeb695967f173cf835_0.webp)
